subject: Airport transfer options
body: Hi, what is the easiest way to get from Naples airport to your hostel, and can you share the late check-in policy?

subject: Cancellation question
body: Hello, I may need to cancel my booking for next week. Please confirm your cancellation policy and whether any refund applies.

subject: Payment method
body: Can I pay with card when I arrive, or do you require payment in advance?

subject: Breakfast details
body: Do you provide breakfast, and if yes what are the serving hours?

subject: Luggage storage
body: Is it possible to leave luggage before check-in and after check-out on the same day?
